contentHomePage.introductionBottomText: Don't let your ideas remain ideas
contentHomePage.aboutMeText: My name is Mihajlo Radović, and I'm a Junior Developer who is about to graduate from the University of Sciences, from the field of Information Technologies. During my studies I gained a solid foundation in programming (Java, Web Development, Android Development) that helped me land an internship. At Infinitydev I got the chance to work on a real project with a team, which helped me deepen my knowledge and gain real work experience.
contentHomePage.workExperienceText: A summary of my previous work experiences:

contentProjects.firstProjectDescription: Grid view of card notes from people with different career paths and their experiences.
contentProjects.secondProjectDescription: Android TV App that displays list of available devices. The app is also capable of starting meetings using Jitsi framework.

contentContact.contactFormText: I'm here to help. Fill out the form or contact me via e-mail or phone. We'll be in touch as soon as possible:
